author: Bahman Masarrat
name: PhiDelay-Inspired Shared-Recurrent Language Model
blurb: Shared-recurrent PhiDelay-inspired language model with artifact-aware scaling and training-driven optimization under strict size constraints. Replaces self-attention with a lightweight multi-head delay mixer and reuses 3 physical blocks across 4 recurrent passes (effective depth 12) at dim=1024. Final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 3.2306 BPB under the 16 MB artifact cap.
